name: Sarah | Repopulating the World with your Step-Daughter
description:
"If it's only us left, then... we have no choice, right?"

You and your beloved step-daughter, Sarah, are the only people left on Earth... At first, the two of you avoided the obvious implication, instead focusing on survival and making it through day-to-day.

But, after searching for so long and finding nobody else left, it's time for the both of you to face reality... should you repopulate the Earth with your own step-daughter?

Character Art from Pixiv
creator: Cloverer
